title: ManyWoodVariants
description: Changes Vanilla wood recipes and balance.
body:
This mod add lumbers for every wood variant and changes some of the vanilla recipes.

4 lumbers is equivalent with 1 planks

Recipe changes:

- Chest uses 8 lumbers now instead of 8 planks)
- Sticks is crafted using 2 lumbers
- Fances, fance gates, buttons and pressure plates use lumbers instead of planks.
- more changes planned for the future

Mod support:
- Regions Unexplored (Forge only until i learn to do it for fabric)
